patterns.name: Two Pointers
patterns.when_to_use: Sorted arrays, finding pairs, palindromes, removing duplicates

patterns.name: Sliding Window
patterns.when_to_use: Contiguous subarrays/substrings, finding max/min in window, distinct elements

patterns.name: Fast & Slow Pointers
patterns.when_to_use: Linked list cycles, finding middle, palindrome linked lists

patterns.name: Merge Intervals
Cyclic Sort
patterns.when_to_use: Arrays with numbers in range [1, n], finding missing/duplicate numbers

patterns.name: In-place Linked List Reversal
patterns.when_to_use: Reversing linked lists or portions of them
patterns.template:
def reverse(head):
    prev, curr = None, head
    while curr:
        next_node = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = next_node
    return prev

patterns.name: BFS (Tree/Graph)
patterns.when_to_use: Level-order traversal, shortest path in unweighted graphs, finding connected components

patterns.name: DFS (Tree/Graph)
patterns.when_to_use: Exploring all paths, detecting cycles, topological sort, connected components

patterns.name: Two Heaps
patterns.when_to_use: Finding median in a stream, scheduling with priorities

patterns.name: Subsets / Backtracking
patterns.when_to_use: Generating all subsets, permutations, combinations, power set

patterns.name: Modified Binary Search
patterns.when_to_use: Sorted/rotated arrays, finding boundaries, search space reduction
problems: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array

patterns.name: Top K Elements
K-way Merge
patterns.when_to_use: Merging K sorted lists/arrays, finding smallest range
problems: Kth Smallest Element in Sorted Matrix
Find K Pairs with Smallest Sums

patterns.name: 0/1 Knapsack
patterns.when_to_use: Subset selection with constraints, partition problems, bounded choices

patterns.name: Topological Sort
patterns.when_to_use: DAG ordering, dependency resolution, course scheduling

patterns.name: Monotonic Stack
patterns.when_to_use: Next greater/smaller element, histogram problems, stock span
